10.sourceTitle: Schwalbe Clik Valve retrofit set with pump head, SV/DV to SCV
10.extractionRationale: Single retail price found for Clik valve retrofit kit. The source explicitly states "Sale price: €11.90" in EUR currency. Since only one price was found, the median equals this single price of €11.90.

27.extractionRationale: Counted unique product page URLs for Schwalbe Clik Valve. Sources 1-3 each contain distinct product URLs for different valve lengths (40mm, 60mm, 80mm variants). Source 4 is a category page, not a unique product listing. Total: 3 distinct products.

56.evidenceText: Schwalbe Schlauch models identified: No. 19, No. 19-EL, No. 19L-EL, No. 19L, No. 17-EL, No. 15-EL, No. 15L, No. 13, No. 12, No. 3 - all with Clik Valve (SCV) interface across various sizes

Each unique model number (No. 19, No. 19-EL, No. 19L-EL, No. 19L, No. 17-EL, No. 15-EL, No. 15L, No. 13, No. 12, No. 3) represents a distinct SKU. Excluded conversion kits and pump head adapters as instructed.

61.sourceTitle: Aluminum - Price - Chart - Historical Data - News - Trading Economics
61.evidenceText: Aluminum is expected to trade at 3558.07 USD/Tonne by the end of this quarter, according to Trading Economics global macro models and analysts expectations.
61.extractionRationale: The source directly states the aluminum price as 3558.07 USD/Tonne. This is already in the correct unit (USD per metric ton), so no conversion was necessary. The value is extracted directly from the quoted text.

62.sourceTitle: Aluminium Premium Duty paid US Midwest Historical Prices
62.extractionRationale: Most recent US Midwest aluminum premium value of 1,793.99 cents/lb converted to USD/lb by dividing by 100, yielding $17.94/lb
